description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet with a classic design, painted in a muted blue color. The front features a door with four glass panels arranged vertically, allowing a view of the checkered-patterned contents inside. Below the door is a single drawer with a square metallic handle, matching the door's handle. The sides of the cabinet also have glass panels, providing additional visibility into the interior. The top of the cabinet is capped with a decorative molding, and the base is slightly recessed with simple feet. The overall construction suggests it is made primarily of wood, with glass inserts and metal hardware.
description: A tall blue wooden cabinet with glass-paneled doors and a lower drawer, featuring metallic handles and visible checkered contents inside.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet, showing a solid blue wooden panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: A side view revealing three vertical glass panels and the depth of the cabinet, as well as the thickness of the top molding.
description_view_2: The front view, displaying the glass-paneled door, checkered contents, and the lower drawer with a metallic handle.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, mirroring the left side with three glass panels and the same blue wooden finish.
